injuries.comment: The Oilers said that Clattenburg will miss at least one week in addition to his absence from Saturday's (Dec. 6) game versus the Jets, per Tony Brar of Oilers TV.
The Oilers said on Monday (Dec. 8) that Roslovic will likely be in the mix to return around Christmas, per Tony Brar of Oilers TV.
Walman is week-to-week, per Tony Brar of Oilers TV on Monday (Dec.8).
